---
title: "Feelings about AI"
subtitle: "It's ok to feel conflicted"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, theme.scss]
    slide-number: c/t
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    incremental: false
    transition: fade
    code-line-numbers: false
---

The agony and ecstacy

## Conflicted

![](images/conflicted.png){.absolute top=100 left=100 width="85%"}
